name: Arif Hasan
bio: Met during university in Sylhet. We used to study together before exams and still share memes occasionally. Loves football and late-night tea chats.

name: Nusrat Jahan
bio: Colleague from Robi service point. Very supportive and always helps during busy hours. We often discuss career growth and tech.

name: Rakib Ahmed
bio: School friend and Free Fire teammate. We don’t meet often but still play together sometimes on weekends.

name: Sadia Rahman
bio: My cousin who lives in Dhaka. We used to meet every Eid but recently got busy. She loves cooking and shares recipes.

name: Imran Chowdhury
bio: Gym partner. We motivate each other to stay consistent. Currently both trying to build a V-shape body.

name: Farhana Akter
bio: Lives nearby. We often go out for snacks and talk about daily life. Very easy-going and fun to hang out with.

name: Tanvir Hossain
bio: Met online while learning React. We used to share projects and ideas. Haven’t talked recently but should reconnect.

name: Mithila Sultana
bio: University batchmate. We used to prepare assignments together. Still keep in touch occasionally about career plans.
